response.global_summary: A video featuring a 3D performance of the song "電脳ぴゅあ推し大宣言" (Dennou Pure Oshi Dai Sengen) by hololive 1st Generation, with dialogue intervals at the beginning and end.

scenes.description: Introductory dialogue featuring hololive 1st Generation members.
Performance of '電脳ぴゅあ推し大宣言' by hololive 1st Generation. Song title and artist credits appear on-screen.
scenes.song_title: 電脳ぴゅあ推し大宣言
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: "は～い、これから配信始めるよ みんな観てる? 今回はコラボ配信! あれ? あれれ～? コメントの熱量、なんだか少なくない? まだまだ足りないっ!" (Opening lines)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: "Hey, I'm starting the stream now. Is everyone watching? This time it's a collab stream! Huh? Huh huh? Isn't the heat of the comments a bit low? It's still not enough! Like this!" (Partial translation)
